name: SpendingCapVault

methods.name: create

args.name: global_max_per_txn
args.desc: Default max native coin per payment (micro-units)

args.name: global_daily_cap
args.desc: Default max native coin per UTC day (micro-units)

args.name: global_max_asa_per_txn
args.desc: Default max ASA base units per pay_asa()

methods.desc: Deploy the vault. No agents are added yet — use add_agent() after deployment.

methods.name: pay
methods.desc:
Pay ALGO/VOI to receiver. Any registered, enabled agent may call this.
Enforces (in order):   1. Agent must be registered and enabled   2. Amount ≤ agent's effective max_per_txn   3. Agent's effective daily_cap not exceeded   4. If allowlist_enabled=1: receiver must have a RecipientConfig entry   5. Amount ≤ recipient's effective max_per_txn (if config exists)   6. Recipient's effective daily_cap not exceeded (if config exists)

methods.name: pay_asa
methods.desc:
Transfer ASA (USDC / aUSDC) to receiver. Any registered, enabled agent may call.
Uses global_max_asa_per_txn as the limit (no per-recipient ASA cap in this version).

methods.name: add_agent
methods.desc:
Register a new agent. Set max_per_txn=0 and/or daily_cap=0 to use global defaults.
Overwrites existing config if agent already registered.
Note: caller must fund the vault for the box MBR (~0.033 ALGO per agent).

methods.name: update_agent
methods.desc: Update an existing agent's limits without resetting spend counters.

methods.name: suspend_agent
methods.desc: Immediately block an agent from making payments (e.g. key compromise).

methods.name: remove_agent
methods.desc: Remove an agent entirely and reclaim box MBR.

methods.name: add_recipient
methods.desc:
Add or update a recipient config. Set limits to 0 to use global defaults.
When allowlist_enabled=1, any recipient not in this map is blocked.
Note: caller must fund the vault for the box MBR (~0.030 ALGO per recipient).

methods.name: update_recipient
methods.desc: Update recipient limits without resetting spend counters.

methods.name: remove_recipient
methods.desc: Remove a recipient config and reclaim box MBR.

methods.name: update_global_limits
methods.desc: Update global fallback limits (affects agents/recipients with 0 custom limits).

methods.name: owner_withdraw
methods.desc: Owner withdraws native coin from vault.

methods.name: opt_in_asa
methods.desc: Opt the vault account into an ASA before first pay_asa(). Owner only.

methods.name: get_global_state
methods.desc: Global vault state — simulate, no fee.

methods.name: get_agent_state
methods.desc: Return the AgentConfig for a given agent address — simulate, no fee.

methods.name: get_recipient_state
methods.desc: Return the RecipientConfig for a given recipient — simulate, no fee.

desc: Multi-agent spending cap vault. Same bytecode on Algorand and Voi.
